title: submit_essay_with_valid_data
description: Test the /submit endpoint by submitting an essay with all required fields including student_id, assignment_title, content, wpm, and paste_count. Verify that the response returns a success message and a score indicating the essay was accepted.

title: submit_essay_with_invalid_wpm
description: Test the /submit endpoint by submitting an essay with an invalid or anomalous wpm value. Verify that the API rejects the submission or returns an appropriate error message indicating invalid typing speed.

title: submit_essay_with_invalid_paste_count
description: Test the /submit endpoint by submitting an essay with an invalid or anomalous paste_count value. Verify that the API rejects the submission or returns an appropriate error message indicating invalid paste event count.

title: submit_essay_missing_required_fields
description: Test the /submit endpoint by submitting an essay request missing one or more required fields such as student_id, assignment_title, content, wpm, or paste_count. Verify that the API returns validation errors for missing fields.

title: get_submissions_returns_all_submissions
description: Test the /submissions endpoint by making a GET request to retrieve all stored essay submissions. Verify that the response returns an array of submissions with correct data structure and content for instructor review.
